name: Recession-odds → Defensive-sector long
thesis_original: When Polymarket recession probability rises, defensive sectors (XLU, XLP, XLV) outperform cyclicals as institutional flows rotate to safety; long XLU/short SPY conditional on a 3-day rise in recession-odds.
lesson: Backtest dominated by Q4-2024 risk-off regime. Sign flipped in Q1-2025 when recession-odds kept rising but defensives underperformed alongside a broad-market melt-up. Pure regime trade with no structural carry — the prediction-market signal added zero alpha once the regime turned.
could_resurrect_if: Need ≥4 quarters of stable risk-off regime AND a residualized signal that controls for SPX trend; otherwise treat as a macro overlay only.

name: Crypto-ETF approval drift
thesis_original: Long BTC and ETH spot when Polymarket spot-ETF-approval odds drift up by ≥5pp over 5 sessions; the prediction market leads SEC-decision news and front-runs institutional flows into crypto.
lesson: All of the gross PnL came from the January-2024 BTC ETF approval window. Out-of-sample on the May-2024 ETH approval and the 2025 ETF-extension dates the signal had no predictive power. Backtest is a survivorship illusion built on a single one-time event.
could_resurrect_if: Only revisit if a future ETF-decision cycle produces a fresh, fully out-of-sample sample with ≥3 distinct decision events.

name: Senate-control short-vol
thesis_original: When Polymarket Senate-control odds become decisively one-sided (>80% on either side), realized SPX vol compresses as political-uncertainty premium unwinds; short VIX futures into the resolution window.
lesson: The 2024 election cycle drove essentially the entire backtest PnL — a single multi-month episode dominating ~95% of trade days flagged. Out-of-sample, OOS Sharpe collapsed below 0.2 across 2025 mid-cycle Senate odds with no realized-vol response.
could_resurrect_if: Need at least three distinct election cycles with comparable Senate-control concentration AND a vol-regime control; one cycle is not a sample.

name: Geopolitical-conflict → Oil long
thesis_original: When Polymarket conflict-escalation odds (Middle East, Russia-Ukraine, Taiwan Strait) rise sharply over 48 hours, long front-month WTI futures captures the geopolitical risk premium before spot oil reprices.
lesson: Direction-correct: gross PnL was positive across 4 quarters and 11 distinct escalation episodes. But entry/exit always coincided with widened bid-ask spreads on WTI futures and shallow size at the touch — modeled transaction costs eat ≥110% of gross PnL even at $5M notional. Net edge is negative once realistic slippage is applied.
could_resurrect_if: Only resurrect with execution via a brent-WTI calendar spread or an oil-equity proxy (XOP) that has lower TC; never with outright WTI futures.

name: BTC latency arbitrage (PM ↔ spot)
thesis_original: Polymarket BTC-price binary contracts lag the BTC spot midpoint by 200-800ms during high-flow periods; lean against the PM mid when spot deviates by ≥1bp and capture the convergence within seconds.
lesson: An 8-agent investigation on 2026-05-02 measured the actual midpoint latency across 11 weeks of synchronized PM and Coinbase tick data. The apparent edge was an artifact of unsynchronized clocks in the original study; once timestamps were aligned to NTP, the median lag was 12ms with no exploitable persistence. Net of fees and PM-side fill probability the strategy is flat.
could_resurrect_if: Do not re-explore unless a new angle is added — rolling-σ-conditioned latency, orderbook-imbalance lead, or a different venue pair. Vanilla midpoint lag is dead.

name: Favorites-bias (heavy-favorite under-pricing)
thesis_original: Heavy favorites (PM probability ≥85%) systematically resolve at a higher rate than implied; long the favorite at entry, hold to resolution. Equivalent to selling longshot premium across binary contracts.
lesson: Wave-5 stress tests over four disjoint quarters showed a Q4-2024 Sharpe of 2.1 collapsing to 0.3 in Q1-2025 and 0.1 in Q2-2025 as PM market-makers tightened heavy-favorite spreads. Effect was real but regime-driven: it was a function of immature PM liquidity, not a structural mispricing. Downgraded A_GOLD → B_VALIDATED, allocation halved to 5%, paper-only until 2026Q3 confirms.
could_resurrect_if: Reinstate to A_GOLD only after 2026Q3 paper-trading shows live OOS Sharpe ≥ 0.8 across ≥3 disjoint contract-categories.
